titleStmt.title: SII 15.24: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 24. (B.K. No. 109 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab in the Siddharāmayya temple.
This is dated the 5th regnal year of the king, Dundubhi, Kārttika śu. 12, Monday, corresponding to 1142 A.D., November 2.

It registers a grant of land made by Sōviseṭṭi for worship, offerings, etc., in the temple of Prasannakēśava of the agrahāra Muttage. It is stated that the temple was originally constructed by Sōviseṭṭi's father Cheṭṭiseṭṭi and that the former elevated it and adorned it with a golden pinnacle. The genealogy of the Chālukyas from Tailapa II down to Jagadēkamalla II is given. Sōviseṭṭi is described as a rich merchant having dealings with the king's Paṭṭasāhaṇi Brahmadēva-daṇḍādhīśa. Other grants of land made by Chauḍiseṭṭi and Mādhavaseṭṭi to the same temple and the provision made for the vyākhyāna in the temple of the god are also recorded.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
yanyā sakaṁ
yuda viprēbhyō sarvva
savarṇna haṁ sōmasōmaṁ sahitā sahitāścavaḥ
śrīsahitaṁ sakalasvarvvāsahitaṁ pītavastrakaustubhaśōbhābhāsuravarṇnaṁ supra sabhāsuravijayī prasaṁnakēśavanesevaṁ . ©
haragaurigaḷuṁ vighnēśvaranuṁ jalajātanētranuṁ bhagavatiyuṁ kharakaranuṁ rakṣisuganavarataṁ muttageya sarbbaviprōttamaraṁ .
śrīkēśavadēvara padakōkanadadvaṁdvadiṁdavaḷeda catūratnākaraparivēṣṭita bhūlōka da bharatōrbbiyalli kuṁtaḷadēśaṁ . kuṁ
taḷadēśavanatuḷānaṁtebalōdvṛttarāṣṭrakūṭamahībhṛtsaṁtatiyaṁ tūḷdi suvikrāṁta de paḍadaṁ caḷukya tailapabhū
paṁ . tailapabhūpana tanayaṁ bhūlōkastutyamūrti satyāśrayabhūpāḷakanātana tanayaṁ bhāḷākṣa sadṛkṣa vi
kramādityanṛpaṁ . Ātana tammaṁ sakalakhyātiparāyaṇanajayyanayyaṇadēvaṁ kātara nallada tatsahajātaṁ jayasiṁhabhū
panavṛthākōpaṁ . Ātana putraṁ śaraṇāyātāriputraṁ suvāhanāhavamallaṁ . nītiyutaṁ tattanujātaṁ kali sōyidēvanahi
tadrāvaṁ . Ā sōyidēvananujaṁ bhāsurajaṁbhāsuraripuvibhavaṁ nijamitrāsaṁpatti haranapatrāsaṁ permmāḍirāyanastrasahāyaṁ . he
rmmāḍirāyana magaṁ dharmmātmaṁ sōmabhūpanātana tanujaṁ nirmaḷagātraṁ sucarita dharmmaṁ jagadēkamallanartthige nallaṁ . dhīraṁ jitapāṁḍityaṁ dhīraṁ
jitasakaḷavīravairinarēdraṁ dūrataravarttiyaśasaṁ dūratarahitaṁ pratāpaprithuvīpāḷaṁ . jagadēkamallanripapadayugaḷāṁbhōjōpajīvi sakaḷādhya
kṣaṁ mige dāni paṭṭasāhaṇi vigatabhayaṁ brahmadēvadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . Ā daṁḍādhīśaṁge suvēdi tasamastaratnasaṁpattiya[nā deḍe] perccipa
sukṛtakuśīdavyavahāri sōviseṭṭi variṣṭha . Ā negaḷda sōviseṭṭiya mānōṁnativetta tāyataṁdeya vikhyātānūnavenipa kulasaṁ
tānada nijavarṇnamekkiyeṁtesavellaṁ . Ādibrahmana toḍeyiṁdāda śvētakula vaiśyaroḷvi khyātamādāni bammiseṭṭi taḷōdari dēlava
dhugoldu vallabhanādaṁ . Ā vaiśya bammiseṭṭi ramāvallabhanaṁ samasta vastugaḷiṁ strīvera sarccasi paḍadaṁ kaivalyadama
riyaṁ ceṭṭiseṭṭiyano laviṁ . verasacyutāṁghriyanārādhisi ceṭṭiseṭṭi paḍedaṁ sarbbōrbbīrājana vaḍḍabyavahāriyanā sō
viseṭṭiyaṁ śiṣṭēṣṭanaṁ . muttageya naḍuve bhaktiyiṁduttama viṣṇupratiṣṭheyaṁ māḍisida vittapadiguru mukhavāgi suThe letter ru is engraved above the line in smaller siśe.
vṛttayutaṁ ceṭṭiseṭṭi vaiṣṇavariṣṭaṁ . tannayyaṁ māḍisida jagaṁnāthaṁgeseva hoṁna kaḷasada śileyatyuṁnatagrahavaṁ mūḍisi
saṁnatiyiṁ sōyiseṭṭi vṛttiyanittaṁ . © svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī prithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvaraṁ para
mabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatu pratāpacakravartti jagadēka malladēvava
rṣadeydeneya duṁdubhi saṁvatsarada kārttika śuddha dvādaśi sōmavāradaṁdu svasti śrīmatu sarbbanamasyaduttamadagrahāraṁ
muttageya naḍuvaṇa Uttarāmukhada śrīprasannakēśavadēvargge nityanayamittikada pūjegaṁ
dēvālayada jīrṇnōddhārakkaṁ sōviseṭṭi keyyaṁ koṭṭaṁ . Ā keyya sthaḷa [Eṁ]ṭaneya Ūraḍeyara paṁnasinalli Aḍḍadāri
yiṁ teṁkalu Aghōravaṭṭeyiṁ paḍuvalu taṁna vṛttiya gi yippattu mattaraṁ prabhumukhya mahāja
naṁgaḷige pādapūjeyaṁ koṭṭu Avara kaiyyalu Aruvaṇa bhūmiyāgi paḍedu sōviseṭṭi prasaṁnakēśa
vadēvargge dhārāpūrbbakaṁ koṭṭaṁ Ā keyga dēvaru kuḍuva Aruvaṇa paṇavippattu . mattaṁ cauḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhava
seṭṭiyaruṁ Ūraḍeya cikkavīrarasara makkaḷu muddarasa durggarasaṁgaḷa kaiyalava rānutsāyige baṁda mūḍaṇa guḍḍe
mānyadoḷage beḷḷahāḻa basavaṇnana keyyiṁ pattire paḍuvalu śrīceṁnakēśavadēvara keyyiṁ pattire mūḍalu maṇigavaḷḷiya
sīmeyiṁ pattire teṁkalu keyi mattaru yippatanālku mattaṁ bāgavāḍiya sīmeyiṁpaḍu valu savaṇageyyiṁ
pattire baḍagalu kāḷikabbegeyyiṁ pattire mūḍalu karabhūmiyiṁ pattire teṁkalu mattarāṟu Antu mattaru mūvattumaṁ Avara kaiyya
lu dhāregoṁḍu sōviseṭṭiyaru śrī prasaṁnakēśavadēvargge sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cavuḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiya
ruṁ Ā viṭṭarasara maga lakhayyana kaiyalāyaṇanānutsāyige baṁda mūḍaṇa guḍḍe mānyadoḷage saṁkarasana mānyadiṁ pa
ttire paḍuvalu viṣṇubhaṭṭadaṁḍanāyakarattegaḷa kaiyiṁ pattira baḍagalu cikkagōviṁdarasara mānyadiṁ pattire mūḍalu kā
ḷikabekeyyiṁ pattire teṁkalu mattaru hadināṟumanāyaṇana kayyalu dhāragoṁḍu sōyiseṭṭiyaru śrī prasaṁnakēśa
va dēvargge sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ śrīmanmahāvaḍḍabyavahāri sōyiseṭṭi yaru vūraḍeya hiriya saṁkarasa
ra kaiyalu Avarānutsāyada mūḍaṇa guḍḍe mānyadūḷage Ukkaliya dāriyiṁ pattire paḍuvalu khaṁḍika dēsara keyyiṁ
pattire baḍagalu cikka viṭharasara desayiṁdivaru dhāregoṇḍa keyyiṁ pattire mūḍalu basadiya keyyiṁ pattire teṁkalu mattaru
nālku . mattaṁ Avarānutsāyadiṁ baṁda guḍḍemānyadaṁgaḍi rājabīdiyiṁ paḍuvala mūvarūraḍeyara samutsāyada mānyadaṁga
ḍiya baḍagalu saṁkarasana mānyagēriyiṁ mūḍalu dāvaṇaseṭṭiyara karabhūmiyaṁgaḍiyiṁ pattire teṁkalu Aṁgaḍi nivēśana
voṁdu . [A]ṁtumanavara kaiyalu dhāregoṁḍu śrī prasannakēśavadēvargge sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cavuḍiseṭṭiyaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭi
yaruṁ Ūroḍeya cikkagōviṁdarasara māma gōviṁdadēvana kayyalu Avarānutsāyāge baṁda mūḍaṇa guḍḍe mānyadoḷage cikka
viṭṭarasara kayyalu dēvaru dhāregoṁḍa hedināṟu mattariṁ pattire paḍuvala Attavvakeyyiṁ pattire baḍagalu Avara sthaḷadoḷage mattareraḍumanavara kayya
lu dhāregoṁḍu śrī prasaṁnakēśavadēvargge sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cauḍiseṭṭi yaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaru Ūraḍeya hiriya
gōviṁdarasara maga bācarasana Avarattige kōmaladēviya Antirbbara kayyalu Avarānu tsāyāge baṁda mūḍaṇa guḍḍe mā
nyadoḷage heggaḍegaḷa kāmayyaṁgaḷu dhāregoṁḍa keyyiṁ pattire paḍuvalu cikkagōviṁda rasara mānyadiṁ pattire baḍagalu mūvarūraḍe
yarānutsāya keyyiṁ pattire mūḍalu maṇigavaḷḷiya sīmeyiṁ pattire teṁkalu matteru yippattumanavara kaiyalu dhāregoṁ
ḍu śrī prasaṁnakēśavadēvara byākhyānakke sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ cavuḍiseṭṭi yaruṁ mādhavaseṭṭiyaruṁ hiriya saṁ
karasara mānyadoḷage haṁdaṟugeṟeya dāriyiṁ paḍuvalu tikēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ pattire mūḍalu caṭṭēśvaradēvara keyyiṁ
pattire teṁkalu yaraḷigeya vaijarasaṁge dhāreyiṁ baṁda sthaḷadoḷage mattaru hattumanālara ṭṭegeya vaijarasena kayyalu dhā
regoṁḍu śrī prasaṁnakēśavadēvargge sadbhaktiyiṁ koṭṭaru . mattaṁ śrīmanmahāvaḍḍa byavahāri sōyiseṭṭiyaru haṟuheya mācaṇana kayya
lu dhāregoṁḍa tōṭa kōṇeya saṁkēśvaradēvare tōṭadiṁ pattire paḍuvalu vimaḷēśvara dēvara tōṭadiṁ pattire baḍagalu siddhēśva
ra dēvara tōṭadiṁ pattire mūḍalu niṁbarasara tōṭadiṁ pattire teṁkalu tōṭa kamma sāyiradayinūṟumaṁ śrī prasaṁnakēśavadēvargge sadbha
ktiyiṁ koṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.24 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
